title: Seared Ham Noodle Stir Fry
description: A spicy Thai-inspired stir fry made with pan-seared ham and served over noodles.
instructions: Heat a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced ham and sear until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the ham from the pan and set aside.
Add the sliced serrano pepper to the pan and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the noodles to the pan and cook according to package instructions.
Return the ham to the pan and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with additional serrano pepper slices if desired.
